_comment: Confirmation-prompt detection keywords. All matching is case-insensitive. Edit this file (or drop an override at ~/.mvibe/prompt_rules.json) to tune which TUI screens count as a confirmation that gets forwarded to the phone.
_extract_comment: How to trim the forwarded confirmation text. Claude draws a horizontal rule before the confirm box; we forward only what follows it (falling back to a few lines above the question). Bottom hint lines are dropped.
